content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.model_manager
FILE: cosmos/core/model_manager.py (786 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Model Manager

Novel Approaches:
1. Predictive Model Preloading - Anticipate needed models based on usage patterns
2. Smart Memory Management - Dynamic VRAM/RAM balancing
3. Model Fingerprinting - Quick validation without full load
4. Hot-Swap Capability - Seamless model switching without res

CLASSES:
- HardwareProfile(Enum)
- HardwareInfo: Detected hardware capabilities.
- ModelInfo: Model metadata and status.
- ModelLoadResult: Result of model loading operation.
- ModelManager: Central model management with intelligent loading/unloading.

Features:
- Automa
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> HardwareInfo
  Methods: async def load_model(self, model_key: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> ModelLoadResu
  Methods: async def unload_model(self, model_key: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_backend(self, model_key: str) -> Optional[LLMBackend]
  Methods: def get_best_model_for_task(self, task_type: str, field: Optional[dict]=None) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def create_cascade_backend(self, model_keys: Optional[list[str]]=None, config: Optional[Genera
  Methods: async def download_model(self, model_key: str, progress_callback: Optional[Callable]=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, system: Optional[str]=None, config: Optional[dict]=None) -> st
